purpose: Detect when an LDD Review Sync references stale Tianma Work OS phase, commit, checkpoint, operating mode, or portfolio mode.
current_twos_phase: Vol.6 Phase 6.7a - LDD Premarket Rebound Confirmation Governance Sync

detection_rules.expected_current_value: Vol.6 Phase 6.8 - Static Consumer Fixture Integration and Handoff
detection_rules.required_action: Correct runtime/product baseline context while preserving broker/Binance facts.
detection_rules.validation_rule: Correct runtime/product baseline context only; do not block Source-of-Truth market/account facts when broker/Binance screenshots remain authoritative.

detection_rules.required_action: Compare LDD sync commit against current_twos_commit and correct baseline context.

detection_rules.description: ldd review sync after codex phase without backfeed
detection_rules.drift_condition: ldd sync follows Codex phase without latest backfeed
detection_rules.required_action: Require LDD baseline sync before next LDD review if practical.

validation_expectations: Detector must include stale phase/commit/checkpoint/mode rules and backfeed-required rules without blocking Source-of-Truth screenshots.
